# Jaguars Cricket Club - Full Stack Project

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify project structure created
- [x] Scaffold backend (Node.js with Express)
- [x] Scaffold frontend (React)
- [x] Configure MongoDB integration
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Run development servers
- [ ] Test the setup

## Project Overview
- **Frontend:** React.js with Vite
- **Backend:** Node.js with Express
- **Database:** MongoDB
- **Root:** Full-stack application with separate client and server folders
